sections.paragraph: a root not used in Hebrew. Arab. بَعُدَ to be distant, remote; Eth. pr. to be another, different; hence pret. A. trans. በዐደ፡ to change, to exchange, ተበዐደ፡ to become other, ብዕድ፡ and ባዕድ፡ other, different. It appears in Hebrew to have denoted to be without any thing (opp. to within it) to be near it, by it. Hence-
